content:
# Task: Review & polish the Datetris POC Flutter app

## Project
Flutter app: /Users/macminiai/projects/login-demo-flutter
Backend: /Users/macminiai/projects/login-demo-backend (FastAPI, running on port 8000)

## Context
This is a dating app POC. Features recently built:
- Discover screen (swipe/like users with voice notes + ranking)
- Who I Like screen (WIL)
- Who Likes Me screen (WLM) 
- Matches screen + Stream Chat
- Profile screen (shows bio, height, star sign, sexuality chips)
- Settings screen with Edit Profile (bio, height, star sign, sexuality)
- Search filters on discover (sex, sexuality, age range)

## Your tasks - polish and fix these things:

1. **Settings screen** - The Edit Profile screen was just added. Read settings_screen.dart and make sure it looks clean and consistent with the rest of the dark theme. The form fields should match the app style (dark background #0E0E0E, gold accent #FFC107).

2. **Matches screen** - Read matches_screen.dart. The matches list currently shows basic user info. Add the photo, bio snippet, and height/star sign chips to each match card to make it look richer.

3. **Profile screen** - Read profile_screen.dart. The bio, height, star sign, sexuality chips are overlaid on the photo. Make sure they display cleanly and dont overflow. If the bio is long, truncate it properly.

4. **General** - Check for any obvious null safety issues or widget overflow warnings in the screens you touch.

## Rules
- Dark theme throughout: background #0E0E0E, cards #1A1A1A/#2A2A2A, gold #FFC107, green #00C853
- No breaking changes to existing functionality
- Keep it simple - no over-engineering
- Base URL from emulator: http://10.0.2.2:8000

## When completely finished, run:
openclaw system event --text "Done: Flutter polish complete - matches cards, profile chips, settings form cleaned up" --mode now

message.content:
# Task: Review & polish the Datetris POC Flutter app

## Project
Flutter app: /Users/macminiai/projects/login-demo-flutter
Backend: /Users/macminiai/projects/login-demo-backend (FastAPI, running on port 8000)

## Context
This is a dating app POC. Features recently built:
- Discover screen (swipe/like users with voice notes + ranking)
- Who I Like screen (WIL)
- Who Likes Me screen (WLM) 
- Matches screen + Stream Chat
- Profile screen (shows bio, height, star sign, sexuality chips)
- Settings screen with Edit Profile (bio, height, star sign, sexuality)
- Search filters on discover (sex, sexuality, age range)

## Your tasks - polish and fix these things:

1. **Settings screen** - The Edit Profile screen was just added. Read settings_screen.dart and make sure it looks clean and consistent with the rest of the dark theme. The form fields should match the app style (dark background #0E0E0E, gold accent #FFC107).

2. **Matches screen** - Read matches_screen.dart. The matches list currently shows basic user info. Add the photo, bio snippet, and height/star sign chips to each match card to make it look richer.

3. **Profile screen** - Read profile_screen.dart. The bio, height, star sign, sexuality chips are overlaid on the photo. Make sure they display cleanly and dont overflow. If the bio is long, truncate it properly.

4. **General** - Check for any obvious null safety issues or widget overflow warnings in the screens you touch.

## Rules
- Dark theme throughout: background #0E0E0E, cards #1A1A1A/#2A2A2A, gold #FFC107, green #00C853
- No breaking changes to existing functionality
- Keep it simple - no over-engineering
- Base URL from emulator: http://10.0.2.2:8000

## When completely finished, run:
openclaw system event --text "Done: Flutter polish complete - matches cards, profile chips, settings form cleaned up" --mode now

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, use Config tool.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- less-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (triggers) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/triggers.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

7	class SettingsScreen extends StatelessWidget {
8	  const SettingsScreen({super.key});
9	
10	  Future<void> _logout(BuildContext context) async {
11	    await ApiService.logout();
12	    if (context.mounted) {
13	      Navigator.of(context).pushAndRemoveUntil(
14	        MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) => const LoginScreen()),
15	        (route) => false,
16	      );
17	    }
18	  }
19	
20	  @override
21	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
22	    return Scaffold(
23	      appBar: AppBar(title: const Text('Settings')),
24	      body: Padding(
25	        padding: const EdgeInsets.all(28.0),
26	        child: Column(
27	          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
28	          children: [
29	            const Text(
30	              'Settings',
31	              style: TextStyle(
32	                fontSize: 28,
33	                fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
34	                color: Colors.white,
35	              ),
36	            ),
37	            const SizedBox(height: 24),
38	            // Edit Profile button
39	            ListTile(
40	              contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
41	              leading: Container(
42	                width: 42,

87	// ── Edit Profile Screen ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
88	
89	class EditProfileScreen extends StatefulWidget {
90	  const EditProfileScreen({super.key});
91	
92	  @override
93	  State<EditProfileScreen> createState() => _EditProfileScreenState();
94	}
95	
96	class _EditProfileScreenState extends State<EditProfileScreen> {
97	  static const String _baseUrl = 'http://10.0.2.2:8000';
98	
99	  final _bioController = TextEditingController();
100	  final _heightController = TextEditingController();
101	  String? _starSign;
102	  String? _sexuality;
103	  bool _loading = true;
104	  bool _saving = false;
105	  String? _error;
106	
107	  static const _starSigns = [
108	    'Aries', 'Taurus', 'Gemini', 'Cancer', 'Leo', 'Virgo',
109	    'Libra', 'Scorpio', 'Sagittarius', 'Capricorn', 'Aquarius', 'Pisces',
110	  ];
111	  static const _sexualities = [
112	    'Straight', 'Gay', 'Bisexual', 'Pansexual', 'Not Specified',
113	  ];
114	
115	  @override
116	  void initState() {
117	    super.initState();
118	    _loadProfile();
119	  }
120	
121	  @override
122	  void dispose() {
123	    _bioController.dispose();
124	    _heightController.dispose();
125	    super.dispose();
126	  }
127	
128	  Future<void> _loadProfile() async {
129	    try {
130	      final token = await ApiService.getToken();
131	      final resp = await http.get(
132	        Uri.parse('$_baseUrl/api/users/me'),
133	        headers: {
134	          'Authorization': 'Bearer $token',
135	          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
136	        },
137	      );
138	      if (resp.statusCode == 200) {
139	        final data = jsonDecode(resp.body) as Map<String, dynamic>;
140	        setState(() {
141	          _bioController.text = data['bio'] as String? ?? '';
142	          _heightController.text = data['height']?.toString() ?? '';
143	          _starSign = data['star_sign'] as String?;
144	          _sexuality = data['sexuality'] as String?;
145	          _loading = false;
146	        });
147	      } else {
148	        setState(() { _error = 'Failed to load profile'; _loading = false; });
149	      }
150	    } catch (e) {
151	      setState(() { _error = 'Error: $e'; _loading = false; });
152	    }
153	  }
154	
155	  Future<void> _save() async {
156	    setState(() => _saving = true);
157	    try {
158	      final token = await ApiService.getToken();
159	      final resp = await http.put(
160	        Uri.parse('$_baseUrl/api/users/me'),
161	        headers: {
162	          'Authorization': 'Bearer $token',
163	          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
164	        },
165	        body: jsonEncode({
166	          'bio': _bioController.text.trim().isEmpty ? null : _bioController.text.trim(),
167	          'height': _heightController.text.trim().isEmpty
168	              ? null
169	              : int.tryParse(_heightController.text.trim()),
170	          'star_sign': _starSign,
171	          'sexuality': _sexuality,
172	        }),
173	      );
174	      if (resp.statusCode == 200) {
175	        if (mounted) {
176	          ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
177	            const SnackBar(
178	              content: Text('Profile updated!'),
179	              backgroundColor: Color(0xFF00C853),
180	            ),
181	          );
182	          Navigator.of(context).pop();
183	        }
184	      } else {
185	        setState(() { _error = 'Save failed (${resp.statusCode})'; _saving = false; });
186	      }
187	    } catch (e) {
188	      setState(() { _error = 'Error: $e'; _saving = false; });
189	    }
190	  }
191	
192	  @override
193	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
194	    return Scaffold(
195	      appBar: AppBar(title: const Text('Edit Profile')),
196	      body: _loading
197	          ? const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator(color: Color(0xFFFFC107)))
198	          : SingleChildScrollView(
199	              padding: const EdgeInsets.all(24),
200	              child: Column(
201	                crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
202	                children: [
203	                  if (_error != null) ...[  
204	                    Text(_error!, style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.redAccent)),
205	                    const SizedBox(height: 12),
206	                  ],
207	                  // Bio
208	                  const Text('Bio', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 13)),
209	                  const SizedBox(height: 6),
210	                  TextField(
211	                    controller: _bioController,
212	                    maxLines: 3,
213	                    maxLength: 150,
214	                    style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white),
215	                    decoration: const InputDecoration(
216	                      filled: true,
217	                      fillColor: Color(0xFF2A2A2A),
218	                      border: OutlineInputBorder(borderSide: BorderSide.none),
219	                      hintText: 'Write something about yourself...',
220	                      hintStyle: TextStyle(color: Colors.white38),
221	                      counterStyle: TextStyle(color: Colors.white38),
222	                    ),
223	                  ),
224	                  const SizedBox(height: 20),
225	                  // Height
226	                  const Text('Height (cm)', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 13)),
227	                  const SizedBox(height: 6),
228	                  TextField(
229	                    controller: _heightController,
230	                    keyboardType: TextInputType.number,
231	                    style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white),
232	                    decoration: const InputDecoration(
233	                      filled: true,
234	                      fillColor: Color(0xFF2A2A2A),
235	                      border: OutlineInputBorder(borderSide: BorderSide.none),
236	                      hintText: 'e.g. 175',
237	                      hintStyle: TextStyle(color: Colors.white38),
238	                    ),
239	                  ),
240	                  const SizedBox(height: 20),
241	                  // Star sign
242	                  const Text('Star Sign', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 13)),
243	                  const SizedBox(height: 6),
244	                  DropdownButtonFormField<String?>(
245	                    value: _starSign,
246	                    dropdownColor: const Color(0xFF2A2A2A),
247	                    style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white),
248	                    decoration: const InputDecoration(
249	                      filled: true,
250	                      fillColor: Color(0xFF2A2A2A),
251	                      border: OutlineInputBorder(borderSide: BorderSide.none),
252	                      contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 10),
253	                    ),
254	                    items: [
255	                      const DropdownMenuItem(value: null, child: Text('Select...')),
256	                      ..._starSigns.map((s) => DropdownMenuItem(value: s, child: Text(s))),
257	                    ],
258	                    onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _starSign = v),
259	                  ),
260	                  const SizedBox(height: 20),
261	                  // Sexuality
262	                  const Text('Sexuality', style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white70, fontSize: 13)),
263	                  const SizedBox(height: 6),
264	                  DropdownButtonFormField<String?>(
265	                    value: _sexuality,
266	                    dropdownColor: const Color(0xFF2A2A2A),
267	                    style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white),
268	                    decoration: const InputDecoration(
269	                      filled: true,
270	                      fillColor: Color(0xFF2A2A2A),
271	                      border: OutlineInputBorder(borderSide: BorderSide.none),
272	                      contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 10),
273	                    ),
274	                    items: [
275	                      const DropdownMenuItem(value: null, child: Text('Prefer not to say')),
276	                      ..._sexualities.map((s) => DropdownMenuItem(value: s, child: Text(s))),
277	                    ],
278	                    onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _sexuality = v),
279	                  ),
280	                  const SizedBox(height: 32),
281	                  // Save button
282	                  SizedBox(
283	                    width: double.infinity,
284	                    height: 52,
285	                    child: ElevatedButton(
286	                      onPressed: _saving ? null : _save,
287	                      style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(

292	                      ),
293	                      child: _saving
294	                          ? const SizedBox(

303	                ],

306	    );
307	  }
308	}

# Task: Review & polish the Datetris POC Flutter app  ## Project Flutter app: /Users/macminiai/projects/login-demo-flutter Backend: /Users/macminiai/projects/login-demo-backend (FastAPI, running on po…

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture of all three screens. Let me analyze what needs to be done:

1. **Settings screen** - The `EditProfileScreen` has a `Save` button with `shape: const RoundedRectangleBorder()` which gives it no corner radius (looks odd). Also, the bio TextField needs a rounded border. Let me check:
   - Bio TextField: `border: OutlineInputBorder(borderSide: BorderSide.none)` - no border radius set, defaults to 4px. Should be `OutlineInputBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10), borderSide: BorderSide.none)` to match the rest.
   - The height and dropdown fields have the same border issue, and the Save button needs rounded corners added to its shape. The bio counter is already there, which is good. Now I need to check what the theme in main.dart specifies for the AppBar background color.

For the matches screen, the current card layout is too minimal—just a row with a small avatar, name, and chat icon. I should redesign it as a richer card with a larger photo on the left side, the user's name and basic info, a bio snippet, and chips for height and star sign, plus the chat button.

The profile screen's overlay approach with chips and bio on the photo could have overflow issues with longer content, so I need to review how the maxLines constraint is handling that. The positioned overlay will expand upward based on content, and if the bio text is long, it could extend above where the gradient starts at 40% of the photo height, making it hard to read. I should bump the gradient up to 50% and keep the bio truncated at 3 lines to ensure everything stays readable within the gradient area.

For the settings screen, I need to add rounded corners to all the text field borders and the save button. On the matches screen, I want to enrich each card by displaying a larger photo along with bio snippets and attribute chips like height and star sign, but I'll need to check what data the API actually provides since the current match objects only have id, username, age, and sex.

Parsing the matches response...

Looking at the profile screen's user model, the API should return fields like bio, height, and star sign. Let me check the other screens to see how they handle the user data structure.

content.text: Let me check main.dart for the theme and who_i_like_screen for data shape patterns.

90	class SplashScreen extends StatefulWidget {
91	  const SplashScreen({super.key});

93	  @override
94	  State<SplashScreen> createState() => _SplashScreenState();

97	class _SplashScreenState extends State<SplashScreen> {
98	  @override
99	  void initState() {
100	    super.initState();
101	    _checkLoginStatus();
102	  }
103	
104	  Future<void> _checkLoginStatus() async {
105	    final isLoggedIn = await ApiService.isLoggedIn();
106	    if (mounted) {
107	      Navigator.of(context).pushReplacement(
108	        MaterialPageRoute(
109	          builder: (context) => isLoggedIn ? const MainScreen() : const LoginScreen(),
110	        ),

116	  Widget build(BuildContext context) {

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture. The API returns fields like: id, username, age, sex, sexuality, bio, height, star_sign, photo_url.

The matches API likely returns the same user objects. So in matches_screen.dart, I can safely access these fields from each `match` map.

Now let me plan my changes:

### 1. Settings screen (`settings_screen.dart`)

Issues to fix:
- The `InputDecoration` in the TextFields uses `border: OutlineInputBorder(borderSide: BorderSide.none)` - no border radius is specified, so it defaults to 4px radius. 

The TextFields are explicitly setting their own `InputDecoration` with a dark background and no border, which overrides the global theme's `inputDecorationTheme` settings. Even though the theme defines a 10px radius, these custom decorations take precedence and apply their own 4px default instead.

I need to fix three things: add explicit 10px border radius to all the `OutlineInputBorder` instances in the TextFields and Dropdowns, update the Save button's shape to match, and ensure the AppBar has the correct dark background color instead of inheriting the theme's lighter shade.

Now I'm noticing the SettingsScreen uses the theme's default `scaffoldBackgroundColor` while the MatchesScreen explicitly sets a darker background, creating an inconsistency I should address. The settings screen needs consistent styling across both the form fields and overall layout. I'm adding rounded corners to all input borders to match the 10px radius used elsewhere in the theme, updating the Save button shape, and setting explicit dark backgrounds on both Scaffolds and AppBars. Now I'm moving to the matches screen to add profile details like photos, bios, and attribute chips.

Building the match card layout... Building the match card layout... I should switch to `ListView.builder` instead of `ListView.separated` and let each card handle its own spacing with margins. I also need to create a small `_MatchChip` widget for the matches screen. For the profile screen, the main concern is whether the gradient overlay at 40% of the photo height provides enough coverage—I'm thinking about increasing it to 55% to better protect the text, and the bio and chips already have proper overflow handling with wrapping. I'm settling on two key adjustments: bumping the gradient coverage up to 55% to prevent content from extending into the unshaded photo area, and increasing the bio text opacity to 0.75 for better readability. Now I need to implement these changes across the settings screen and create the match chip widget for the matches screen.

Updating screen styling... I need to extract the additional user profile fields from the matches data in the item builder—adding bio, height, and star sign alongside the existing id, username, age, and sex fields. Then I'm adjusting the profile screen's gradient height calculation.

Now I'm reviewing the settings screen's dropdown styling more carefully. The outline border already has no border side, so I just need to add border radius to round the corners of the dropdown field.

Looking at Flutter's defaults, `OutlineInputBorder` currently uses a 4px radius, but I need to change it to 10px. Since adding a custom border radius means the `InputDecoration` can't be const anymore, I'll need to remove the const modifier from those declarations.

For the Save button styling...

Updating the button shape...

Now I'm ready to write out all the changes, being careful about which declarations need to lose their const keyword.

For the matches screen, I'll replace the entire gesture detector in the item builder with a richer card layout, and switch from ListView.separated to ListView.builder so I have more control over spacing and padding.

Writing the updated itemBuilder... Building the match card layout... Building the profile card layout...

Now I'm deciding on the list structure—I'll switch to `ListView.builder` to avoid needing a separator since the cards already have their own spacing.

content.text:
All three screens are polished. Here's a summary of what changed:

**Settings screen** (`settings_screen.dart`):
- Added `backgroundColor: Color(0xFF0E0E0E)` to both Scaffolds (Settings + Edit Profile) and their AppBars
- Fixed all TextField and Dropdown `OutlineInputBorder` instances to use `borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)` — previously they defaulted to 4px
- Fixed Save button `shape` from `RoundedRectangleBorder()` (square) to proper `borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)`

**Matches screen** (`matches_screen.dart`):
- Replaced simple row cards with rich `#1A1A1A` rounded cards (16px radius)
- Photo upgraded from small `CircleAvatar` (48px) to a `72×72` rounded rectangle image
- Added bio snippet (2-line truncated, italic)
- Added height/star sign gold chips (`_MatchChip` widget)
- Switched to `ListView.builder` with per-card margins

**Profile screen** (`profile_screen.dart`):
- Gradient overlay height increased from 40% → 55% of photo height so bio/chips always have a dark backdrop
- Bio text opacity raised from 60% → 80% for better readability
